case.title: DEVRIES v. BAUMGARTNER'S ELECTRIC CONSTRUCTION CO.

opinion.h: DEVRIES v. BAUMGARTNER'S ELECTRIC CONSTRUCTION CO., 359 U.S. 498 (1959)
DEVRIES ET AL. v. BAUMGARTNER'S ELECTRIC CONSTRUCTION CO. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF SOUTH DAKOTA. No. 551. Decided May 18, 1959.
opinion.p: Louis Sherman and Joseph M. Stone for petitioners.
The petition for writ of certiorari is granted. The judgment is reversed. San Diego Building Trades Council v. Garmon, ante, p. 236.

MR. JUSTICE CLARK, MR. JUSTICE HARLAN, MR. JUSTICE WHITTAKER, and MR. JUSTICE STEWART dissent for the reasons set forth in the concurring opinion in San Diego Building Trades Council v. Garmon, ante, pp. 236, 249.
opinion.h: ANDERSON v. CITY OF CEDAR RAPIDS, 359 U.S. 498 (1959)
opinion.p: 359 U.S. 498 ANDERSON ET AL. v. CITY OF CEDAR RAPIDS. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF IOWA. No. 786. Decided May 18, 1959.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Ernest F. Pence and Roy A. Golden for appellants.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
